# Presence

Use `Presence` for advanced mount and animation control when component visibility must be managed explicitly.

## When to Use

- Animation edge cases and manual enter/exit control
- Advanced primitive composition

## Wraps

- `reka-ui` presence primitive

## What Shadcn Adds

- Consistency with registry conventions when you need low-level control

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add presence
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: mount-aware animation wrapper
- Contextual: advanced overlay or menu transitions
